interfaces.name: getHomeContent
interfaces.description: Fetch homepage content including hero, value propositions, and quick highlights for tours, lodging, shop, groups, and gift cards.

interfaces.name: getFeaturedExperiences
interfaces.description: Get featured tours, workshops, stays, products, and any special offers for the homepage.

interfaces.name: getTourActivityFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter options for the Tours & Activities list page, including activity types, audiences, time of day, and price ranges.

interfaces.name: getTourActivitiesList
interfaces.description: List available tours and activities with optional filters for type, audience, time of day, date, and max price.

date.description: ISO date string 'YYYY-MM-DD' to filter activities with sessions on this date.

interfaces.name: getTourActivityDetail
interfaces.description: Get detailed information for a single tour or activity, including description, photos, requirements, and available add-ons.

interfaces.name: getActivitySessionsForDate
interfaces.description: Get available sessions (time slots) for a specific tour/activity on a given date.

interfaces.name: getActivityPricingPreview
interfaces.description: Calculate pricing for a specific activity session given adult/child counts and selected add-ons, before adding to cart.

interfaces.name: addActivitySessionToCart
interfaces.description: Add a configured tour/activity session to the cart, creating the cart if needed.

interfaces.name: getWorkshopsList
interfaces.description: List available workshops and classes with optional filters for topic, skill level, date, and max price.

interfaces.name: getWorkshopFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter options for the Workshops & Classes list page.

interfaces.name: getWorkshopDetail
interfaces.description: Get detailed information for a single workshop, including objectives, instructor, duration, and prerequisites.

interfaces.name: getWorkshopSessions
interfaces.description: Get dated offerings (sessions) for a given workshop, optionally from a starting date.

parameters.name: from_date
parameters.description: Optional ISO date string 'YYYY-MM-DD' to only return sessions on/after this date.

interfaces.name: getWorkshopPricingPreview
interfaces.description: Calculate total price for a workshop session for a given number of attendees and an optional promo code before adding to cart.

parameters.name: promo_code
parameters.description: Optional promo code string such as 'llama10'.

interfaces.name: addWorkshopSessionToCart
interfaces.description: Add a workshop session registration to the cart for the specified number of attendees, applying an optional promo code.

parameters.name: promo_code
parameters.description: Optional promo code string such as 'llama10'.

interfaces.name: getLodgingFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the Lodging & Stays overview page, such as capacity ranges and breakfast availability.

interfaces.name: getLodgingList
interfaces.description: List available lodging properties, optionally filtered by dates, capacity, and breakfast requirement.

interfaces.name: getLodgingDetail
interfaces.description: Get detailed information for a lodging property including photos, amenities, and policies.

interfaces.name: getRatePlansForStay
interfaces.description: Get available rate plans and pricing for a lodging property for a specific date range and guest count.

interfaces.name: addLodgingStayToCart
interfaces.description: Add a lodging stay to the cart for a given property, rate plan, date range, and guest counts.

interfaces.name: getPartyPackagesOverview
interfaces.description: List group offerings such as birthday parties and school field trips, optionally filtered by section.

interfaces.name: getPartyPackageDetail
interfaces.description: Get detailed information for a group package (birthday party or school field trip).

interfaces.name: submitGroupPackageInquiry
interfaces.description: Submit an inquiry or quote request for a birthday party or school field trip package.

parameters.name: requested_date
parameters.description: Requested visit date as ISO date string 'YYYY-MM-DD'.

parameters.name: visit_start_time
parameters.description: Optional local start time in 'HH:MM' 24-hour format.

parameters.name: visit_end_time
parameters.description: Optional local end time in 'HH:MM' 24-hour format.

interfaces.name: getProductCategories
interfaces.description: Get active product categories for the farm shop navigation and sidebar.

interfaces.name: getProductFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for a given product category, such as price range, ratings, and sizes.

interfaces.name: searchProducts
interfaces.description: Search or list products in the farm shop with filters for category, price, rating, size, and other attributes.

interfaces.name: getProductDetails
interfaces.description: Get detailed product information including variants, images, description, price, and rating.

interfaces.name: addProductToCart
interfaces.description: Add a retail product (e.g., llama wool socks) to the cart.

parameters.name: variantId
parameters.description: Optional product variant identifier, e.g., for size 'medium'.

interfaces.name: createOrUpdateItinerary
interfaces.description: Create a new weekend itinerary or update the current draft with a start and end date.

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Itinerary start date as ISO date string 'YYYY-MM-DD'.

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: Itinerary end date as ISO date string 'YYYY-MM-DD'.

interfaces.name: getAvailableSessionsForDate
interfaces.description: List available tour and workshop sessions for a specific date to support itinerary planning.

max_start_time.description: Optional max start time 'HH:MM' in 24-hour format, e.g., '13:00'.

interfaces.name: addSessionToItinerary
interfaces.description: Add a tour or workshop session to an itinerary for a given number of participants.

interfaces.name: getItinerarySummary
interfaces.description: Get a summary of the current itinerary including all items, schedule, and total cost.

interfaces.name: addItineraryToCart
interfaces.description: Add the full itinerary as a single item to the cart so all included sessions can be booked together.

interfaces.name: getGiftCardProducts
interfaces.description: List available gift card products, including digital and physical options.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Optional filter for gift card type, e.g., 'digital' or 'physical'.

interfaces.name: getGiftCardDesigns
interfaces.description: List gift card designs, optionally filtering for llama-themed artwork.

parameters.name: is_llama_themed
parameters.description: If true, only return llama-themed designs.

interfaces.name: createGiftCardPurchaseAndAddToCart
interfaces.description: Configure a digital or physical gift card purchase and add it to the cart with scheduled email delivery if applicable.

parameters.name: delivery_date
parameters.description: Scheduled delivery date as ISO date string 'YYYY-MM-DD'.

interfaces.name: getCartSummary
interfaces.description: Get the current cart contents including all items, quantities, dates, and pricing.

interfaces.name: updateCartItemQuantity
interfaces.description: Update the quantity of a given cart item and recalculate cart totals.

interfaces.name: removeCartItem
interfaces.description: Remove a cart item and recalculate cart totals.

interfaces.name: applyPromoCodeToCart
interfaces.description: Apply a promo code to the entire cart if eligible and recalculate totals.

interfaces.name: placeOrder
interfaces.description: Finalize checkout by collecting purchaser info and payment details and creating an order for all items in the cart.

interfaces.name: getAboutContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the About the Farm page including history, mission, and team.

interfaces.name: getContactAndDirectionsContent
interfaces.description: Get address, directions, operating hours, and contact methods for the Contact & Directions page.

interfaces.name: submitContactForm
interfaces.description: Submit a general contact form message from the Contact & Directions page.

interfaces.name: getFaqs
interfaces.description: Get FAQs grouped by section for the FAQ & Policies page.

interfaces.name: getPolicyDocuments
interfaces.description: Get policy content for bookings, refunds, safety, and accessibility.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load the current cart from storage or create a new cart with default values.

helperFunctions.name: _recalculateCartTotals
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to recalculate subtotal, discount_total, and total for a cart based on its items.

helperFunctions.name: _applyPromoCodeToAmount
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to validate a promo code and compute the discount for a given amount and entity type.

helperFunctions.name: _findEarliestAvailableSession
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to find the earliest available activity or workshop session from a list of sessions.
